subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou art He Who hath so enraptured the hearts of Thy loved ones that they would lay down their lives in Thy path [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی انت الذی استجذبت قلوب احبائک علی شان یستشهدن فی سبیلک
subcodes.subjects: @heaven and paradise; heaven and hell, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @martyrs and martyrdom, @love of God
